meta.title: Florida Voting Documents Tool
meta.description: Find out what documents you need to vote in Florida under the new proof of citizenship law.

q_real_id.text: Do you have a Florida REAL ID driver's license or state ID card?
q_real_id.hint: A REAL ID has a gold star in the upper right corner of the card.

q_check_star.text: Look at the upper right corner of your Florida license or ID. Is there a gold star?

choices.label: I don't have a Florida ID

q_has_fl_id.text: Do you have any other Florida driver's license or state ID (without the gold star)?

q_has_passport.text: Do you have a valid U.S. passport or passport card?

result_covered.heading: You're covered.
result_covered.body: Your Florida REAL ID satisfies the documentary proof of citizenship requirement. No additional documents needed to register or vote.

signup.heading: Want updates on Florida voting rights?
signup.body: Sign up to stay informed as this law takes effect in 2027.

result_passport_ok.heading: Your passport works.
result_passport_ok.body: A valid U.S. passport or passport card satisfies the documentary proof of citizenship requirement.

signup.heading: Stay informed on Florida voting rights.
signup.body: Sign up for updates from Common Cause.

result_needs_docs.heading: You'll need to submit additional documents.
result_needs_docs.body: Your current Florida ID isn't a REAL ID, so you'll need to provide proof of citizenship when you register or re-register to vote. The most common option is an original or certified birth certificate — or you can upgrade your ID to a REAL ID.

signup.heading: We can help you through the process.
signup.body: Sign up and we'll send you step-by-step guidance.

result_needs_id.heading: You'll need to get an ID and proof of citizenship.
result_needs_id.body: Without a qualifying ID or passport, you'll need to obtain documents before you can register to vote under the new law. The fastest path is usually getting a Florida REAL ID, which requires proof of citizenship (such as a birth certificate) — but then you only need to show the REAL ID to register.

links.label: How to get a Florida REAL ID

signup.heading: Let us help — we'll walk you through it.
signup.body: Sign up and Common Cause will send you guidance on next steps.
